common.tagline: Learn Solana. Earn Credentials. Build the Future.
common.creator: Creator Dashboard
common.streakInfoDesc: Complete any XP-earning activity daily to maintain your streak. Streaks count lessons, challenges, and achievements.
common.streakInfoReplenish: Freezes replenish to 3 on your first activity each month.
common.walletLinkFailed: Failed to link wallet. Please try again.
common.switchedProfile: You are now signed in as "{name}" because this wallet was already linked to that profile.
common.offlineMessage: You're offline — some features may be limited

landing.heroSubtitle: The most complete learning platform for Solana. Interactive courses, hands-on challenges, and verifiable on-chain credentials.
landing.featuresTitle: Everything You Need to Become a Solana Developer
landing.feature1Desc: Learn by doing with hands-on coding challenges, quizzes, and real-world projects.
landing.feature2Desc: Earn verifiable credentials stored on Solana. Prove your skills to employers.
landing.feature3Desc: Earn XP, maintain streaks, unlock achievements, and climb the leaderboard.
landing.feature4Desc: Write and test Rust and TypeScript code directly in your browser.
landing.feature5Desc: Connect with fellow learners, share knowledge, and collaborate on projects.
landing.feature6Desc: Follow structured learning paths from beginner to expert in your chosen area.
landing.ctaSubtitle: Join thousands of developers learning Solana with interactive courses and on-chain credentials.
landing.ctaSubtitleLoggedIn: Pick up where you left off and keep building your Solana skills.
landing.newsletterDesc: Get weekly updates on new courses, Solana ecosystem news, and learning tips.
landing.newsletterError: Something went wrong. Please try again.
landing.pathsSubtitle: Structured tracks from beginner to expert. Pick your path and start building.
landing.path1Desc: Master Solana from zero. Accounts, programs, PDAs, and your first deployed program.
landing.path2Desc: Build decentralized finance protocols — AMMs, lending, staking, and token mechanics.
landing.path3Desc: Connect frontends to Solana. Wallet integration, transactions, and production dApps.
landing.howStep1Desc: Sign up with Google, GitHub, or your Solana wallet in seconds.
landing.howStep2Desc: Pick a structured learning path or dive straight into any course.
landing.howStep3Desc: Interactive lessons with a built-in code editor. Write and test real Solana programs.
landing.howStep4Desc: Receive verifiable on-chain credentials and climb the leaderboard.
landing.testimonialSubmitted: Your testimonial has been submitted! It may appear on the homepage once approved.
landing.yourTestimonial: Share your experience with Superteam Academy...

courses.title: Course Catalog
courses.subtitle: Browse our collection of interactive Solana courses
courses.noResults: No courses found matching your criteria.
courses.closeEnrollmentWarning1: If you haven't collected your credential NFT, you won't be able to do so after closing this enrollment.
courses.closeEnrollmentWarning2: If this course is a prerequisite for another, closing it means you won't be able to enroll in courses that depend on it.
courses.closeEnrollmentWarning3: Your track credential won't be upgradeable when you complete other courses in the same learning path.
courses.closeEnrollmentNote: These are temporary limitations we're actively working to improve. In a future update, rent will be reclaimed automatically when you collect your credential — no manual closure needed.
courses.coursePreviewDescription: This is a preview. Once approved, this course will be visible in the catalog and learners can enroll.
courses.courseDeactivatedDescription: This course has been deactivated. New enrollments are closed, but enrolled learners can still complete it.
courses.courseNeedsRevisionDescription: This course has been sent back for revision by an admin.
courses.pendingApprovalDescription: This course has been submitted and is awaiting admin approval. Enrollment will be available once approved.
courses.alreadyCompletedDescription: You have already earned credit for this course.

enrollment.alreadyEnrolled: You are already enrolled in this course.
enrollment.prerequisiteNotMet: You must complete the prerequisite course first.
enrollment.courseNotActive: This course is not currently active.
enrollment.unenrollCooldown: You must wait 24h after enrolling to unenroll from an incomplete course.
enrollment.notEnrolled: You are not enrolled in this course.
enrollment.enrolledConfirming: Enrolled! Confirming on-chain… It may take upto 10-15 secs based on RPC lag…

lessons.enrollRequired: You need to enroll in this course before you can mark lessons as complete.
lessons.courseCompleteDescription: Go to the course page to collect your credential NFT and reclaim rent.
lessons.rpcLagNote: If the collect button doesn't show up, refresh the page after a few seconds — RPC indexing can lag.
lessons.serverError: Failed to reach the server. Check your connection.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.noCourses: You haven't enrolled in any courses yet.
dashboard.collectCredentialDescription: You have completed courses! Collect your soulbound credential NFTs below.
dashboard.closeEnrollmentWarning1: If you haven't collected your credential NFT, you won't be able to do so after closing this enrollment.
dashboard.closeEnrollmentWarning2: If this course is a prerequisite for another, closing it means you won't be able to enroll in courses that depend on it.
dashboard.closeEnrollmentWarning3: Your track credential won't be upgradeable when you complete other courses in the same learning path.
dashboard.closeEnrollmentNote: These are temporary limitations we're actively working to improve. In a future update, rent will be reclaimed automatically when you collect your credential — no manual closure needed.
dashboard.noActivityYet: No activity yet. Start a course to earn XP!
dashboard.streakInfoDesc: Complete any XP-earning activity daily to maintain your streak. Streaks count lessons, challenges, and achievements.
dashboard.streakInfoReplenish: Freezes replenish to 3 on your first activity each month.
dashboard.linkWalletForActivity: Link a wallet in Settings to see your XP activity.

admin.title: Admin Dashboard
admin.approveDescription: Review and adjust on-chain parameters before registering this course. These values will be sent to the Solana program.
admin.rejectCommentPlaceholder: Explain why this course is being rejected...
admin.updateDescription: Update on-chain parameters. Changes will be synced to both Sanity and the Solana program.
admin.accessDenied: You do not have access to this page.
admin.noTracks: No tracks yet. Create one to get started.
admin.name: Name
admin.credentialImageNote: In production, credential NFTs can have different images per track. For now, all tracks use a default image.
admin.question: Question
admin.correctOptionHint: Select the radio button next to the correct answer.
admin.noChallenges: No daily challenges yet. Add one to get started.
admin.achievementAutoClaimDesc: Users earn these by meeting conditions (e.g., streaks, completions) and claim from their dashboard.
admin.achievementManualDesc: Admin awards directly via the Award button. These are not auto-checked.
admin.achievementCreatedToast: Achievement created on-chain. The table will auto-refresh in ~15 seconds. Auto-claim achievements require code changes in achievement-checker.ts. Manual-only achievements can be awarded from this panel.
admin.achievementDeactivated: Achievement type deactivated. The table will auto-refresh in ~15 seconds.
admin.searchPlaceholder: Search by name, email, or username...
admin.questionPlaceholder: e.g. What is a PDA in Solana?
